response.justification: Experienced full-stack engineer with 15+ years across multiple languages and one stint on a high-throughput micro-services platform, but the resume shows no direct experience with experimentation frameworks, feature flagging, telemetry/metrics infrastructure, or statistical analysis — the core of this Principal Growth/Experimentation role. Titles top out at Staff/Senior and there is little evidence of IC6-level cross-team architectural leadership or stakeholder influence at enterprise scale.
strengths: Polyglot with 15+ years across JS/TS, Java, C/C++, DLang and Python-adjacent ecosystems
High-scale distributed systems exposure at Sociomantic (millions of HTTP requests/sec, low-latency services)
Active in AI/agent tooling (MCP generators) and strong knowledge-sharing track record via workshops and talks
concerns: No demonstrated experimentation, A/B testing, or feature-flagging platform experience
No evidence of telemetry/metrics infrastructure or statistical/causal-analysis work
Limited signal of Principal/IC6-level scope: cross-org initiatives, multi-team architectural leadership, or measurable business-outcome ownership

key_factors.factor: Insufficient evidence of Principal-level cross-team leadership
Strong general engineering breadth and high-throughput systems experience
